title: apodanthaceae
intro: The apodanthaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is characterized by its unique and relatively small number of genera and species, typically parasitic or semi-parasitic plants that obtain nutrients from other organisms. Apodanthaceae are often found in tropical or subtropical regions and can be distinguished by their unusual growth habits and adaptations. The apodanthaceae family is a relatively rare and specialized group within the plant kingdom.
